name: @rhombus-std/examples.app.without-transformer
description: The without-transformer composition root: the same integrated scenario as the with-transformer app, wired by hand with explicit tokens and plain tsc.

scripts.test: bun run build && node dist/main.js > /tmp/rhombus-std-app-without-transformer.out && diff -u expected.txt /tmp/rhombus-std-app-without-transformer.out
